text: The board has exclusive jurisdiction over the regulation of pilots who provide pilot services in Harris County ports, including intermediate stops and landing places for vessels on navigable streams wholly or partially located in the board’s jurisdiction.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.015 — Jurisdiction

The board has exclusive jurisdiction over the regulation of pilots who provide pilot services in Harris County ports, including intermediate stops and landing places for vessels on navigable streams wholly or partially located in the board’s jurisdiction.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1346 (S.B.1915), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: The board has exclusive jurisdiction over the regulation of pilots who provide pilot services in Harris County ports, including intermediate stops and landing places for vessels on navigable streams wholly or partially located in the board’s jurisdiction.
